title: sedum rupifragum
intro: Sedum rupifragum, also known as stonecrop, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve sore throats, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sedum rupifragum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Sedum rupifragum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
